metadata.name: NetBird Policy
metadata.description: Creates a NetBird access policy with a single rule and optional posture checks.
metadata.guide:
## Overview
Creates a NetBird access policy with one rule.

## Prerequisites
- Create an admin PAT for the NetBird management API before rendering `provider.tf`.
- Provide `source_group_names` and `destination_group_names` as comma-separated existing NetBird group names. The template resolves them with `data "netbird_group"`.
- If you use posture checks, provide `source_posture_check_names` as comma-separated existing NetBird posture check names. The template resolves them with `data "netbird_posture_check"`.
- If `rule_protocol=netbird-ssh`, provide `authorized_group_entries` as a semicolon-separated list in the format `group_name|user1,user2`. The template resolves each group name with `data "netbird_group"` and builds the required ID map automatically.

## Apply
- Render `provider.tf` and `main.tf`.
- Review the resolved source groups, destination groups, protocol, and optional posture checks.
- Run `terraform fmt`, `terraform plan`, and `terraform apply`.

## Notes
- This template renders a single `rule` block. If you need more rules, duplicate the block in the rendered `main.tf`.
- For `ports`, provide raw HCL list entries such as `"443", "8443"`.

## References
- [NetBird Policies](https://docs.netbird.io/how-to/manage-network-access#policies)
- [Terraform Resource](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/resources/policy.md)
- [Group Data Source](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/data-sources/group.md)
- [Posture Check Data Source](https://github.com/netbirdio/terraform-provider-netbird/blob/main/docs/data-sources/posture_check.md)

config.placeholder: Allow app traffic from users to services
Allow HTTPS from users to the app group

variables.name: rule_protocol
variables.title: Protocol
variables.description: Protocol enforced by the policy rule.

variables.name: rule_bidirectional
variables.title: Bidirectional
variables.description: Allow traffic in both directions between the selected groups.

variables.name: source_group_names
variables.title: Source Group Names
variables.description: Comma-separated existing NetBird source group names.

variables.name: destination_group_names
variables.title: Destination Group Names
variables.description: Comma-separated existing NetBird destination group names.

variables.name: ports
variables.title: Ports
variables.description: Raw HCL list entries for ports, for example `"443", "8443"`.

variables.name: authorized_group_entries
variables.title: Authorized Group Entries
variables.description: Semicolon-separated `group_name|user1,user2` entries for NetBird SSH local-user authorization.

variables.name: source_posture_check_names
variables.title: Posture Check Names
variables.description: Comma-separated existing NetBird posture check names.

variables.name: netbird_management_url
variables.title: Management URL
variables.description: NetBird Management API URL. Trailing slashes are trimmed. TLS certificates must be trusted by the OpenTofu runner because the provider does not expose a skip-verification option.

variables.name: netbird_tenant_account
variables.title: Tenant Account
variables.description: Optional tenant account ID for impersonation.
